goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should 'arrive by 18:15'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on thursday and should arrive by 18:15
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode
